entry.title: Stop Doctor Lee from practicing dental work!!!
entry.summary: Dr. Lee has made continous mistakes and has cost me thousands of dollars of rework. I now have a new dentist but I'm paying the price of her mistakes. Dr. Lee also tried to bill my insurance on dates I was not at her office.
entry.content: Dr. Lee has made continous mistakes and has cost me thousands of dollars of rework. I now have a new dentist but I'm paying the price of her mistakes. Dr. Lee also tried to bill my insurance on dates I was not at her office.
